LanguageData.ABY_PhalanxDriver.label: phalanx driver
LanguageData.ABY_PhalanxDriver.description: A disciplined horde-pattern spike rifle built from war-lattice fragments. Instead of flooding the field with fire, it drives a short sequence of infernal penetrators through the target line, excelling at cracking dense frontliners and punishing static cover fights.
LanguageData.ABY_PhalanxSpikeProjectile.label: phalanx spike
